channel.title: Srijana's thoughts
channel.description: Low-Maintenance Is a Lie We Tell Ourselves

item.title: Low-Maintenance Is a Lie We Tell Ourselves
item.description: Being easy-going shouldn’t cost you your voice. Learn why expressing needs respectfully is essential for emotional well-being.

item.title: I Accept Luck Without Surrendering to Fate
item.description: Do luck and fate exist, or are they just stories we tell ourselves to make sense of a chaotic universe?
